title: Department Manager Vacancy at Bata India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Bata India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bata India! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bata India:
Bata India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bata India!
